task.name: Validate Plan Artifacts
task.description: Verify a plan folder contains all required artifacts: main plan, companion files, phase folders, and micro-step task files.
task.objective: Validate that a plan folder contains the complete artifact set required for self-execution. Report missing artifacts with specific paths.

llm.rule: Read the complete task before starting execution.
NEVER assume artifacts exist — verify each one explicitly.
Report ALL missing artifacts, not just the first one found.

input.param: Absolute path to the plan folder (e.g., .cursor/plans/{plan-name}/)

substep.title: Locate plan folder
substep.action: If {plan_folder} not provided, ask user for the plan folder path.

check.action: HALT with error: "Plan folder not found: {plan_folder}"

substep.title: Find main plan file
substep.action: Look for a file matching pattern *.plan.md in the plan folder.

substep.title: Check shape.md
substep.action: Verify shape.md exists in the plan folder.

substep.title: Check learnings.md
substep.action: Verify learnings.md exists in the plan folder.

substep.title: Read plan frontmatter
substep.action: Read the main plan file and parse YAML frontmatter.

check.if: no frontmatter or no todos array
check.action: Record error: "Plan file missing YAML frontmatter or todos array"

substep.title: Extract tasks
substep.action: From the todos array, extract all task IDs.
Identify which tasks are checkpoints (id contains "checkpoint").
Build list of non-checkpoint tasks requiring micro-step files.

substep.title: Determine phases
substep.action: From task IDs (p1-1, p2-1, etc.), determine which phase folders should exist.
Map task prefix (p1, p2, pN) to folder name (phase-1, phase-2, phase-final).

substep.title: Check phase folders
substep.action: For each required phase folder, verify it exists.

check.action: Record missing: "phase-{N}/" for each missing folder

substep.title: Check task files
substep.action: For each non-checkpoint task, verify its micro-step file exists.

check.action: Record missing: "phase-{N}/{task-id}.task.md" for each missing file

substep.title: Compile validation report
substep.action: Generate validation summary with counts and status.

substep.title: Display results
substep.action: Present report using the format below.

mapping-rules.rule: Task IDs follow pattern: p{N}-{name} - p1-* → phase-1/ - p2-* → phase-2/ - pN-* (where N is last phase number) → phase-final/ - Exception: "checkpoint" tasks do NOT have micro-step files
Task ID: p1-1 → File: phase-1/p1-1.task.md Task ID: p2-setup → File: phase-2/p2-setup.task.md Task ID: pN-compound → File: phase-final/pN-compound.task.md
